Careers

Join CPLF and discover a career in disability services where you can make a difference in the lives of those we support in Calgary.

Current Job Postings

Hey there! We’re always on the lookout for amazing people to join our team. Check out the list below for the client-focused jobs we’re hiring for. We’ve got some pretty awesome benefits that come with all our job positions, including:

Support from our Complex Needs Coordinator, Case Manager, and Support Staff
In-house training to help you grow and learn new skills
The possibility to transition into a permanent position from casual
Health benefits available if you work a minimum number of hours
April 28, 2026
Respite and Roommate Care Provider: Filipino Speaking
View Position

Wheelchair Accessible Respite/Roommate Homes

How to Apply to CPLF

To apply to a CPLF job, please complete our work application and submit it to applications@cplf.ca and kindly let us know which job you are applying to.

Work Application
A Fulfilling Opportunity

Meet Emilia Montes, a University of Calgary student in her 3rd year studying Community Rehabilitation and Disability Studies (CRDS)! Emilia speaks about her valuable experience volunteering at CPLF and how it has impacted the direction of her education.
